subject: fix: address code review findings across 8 files
body:
Fix potential bugs, React anti-patterns, and code quality issues identified
in code review. Key changes:

- useHistory: derive canUndo/canRedo from state (not refs) so they trigger
  re-renders correctly
- useAdState: add missing setState deps, remove dead dep from loadDesign,
  restore legacy migration for pre-multi-page saved designs, remove
  console.error statements
- ExportButtons: reject on null blob from canvas.toBlob, track export
  operation type for per-button progress display, remove console.error,
  remove arbitrary 100ms from waitForPaint, add selectCategory toggle
- ContextBar: replace mutable cellIndex with useMemo pre-computed cell map
  (React strict mode safe)
- LayoutTab: same mutable cellIndex fix, remove dead normalizedImageCells
  alias
- ContentTab: use stable noop ref instead of inline arrow, fix unstable
  useMemo dependency on layout.structure (array ref)
- StyleTab: remove redundant aliases, fix overlay reset to delete keys
  instead of setting them to undefined
- platforms.js: remove unused ecommerce category

Tags: bugfix, react, state, export, layout, style
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-fixes
Semver: patch
